creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
A nice approach to deal with slurm might be the one used by net/openmpi: it defines a SLURM option, set by default, but also adds 

OPTIONS_EXCLUDE_armv6=          SLURM
OPTIONS_EXCLUDE_armv7=          SLURM
OPTIONS_EXCLUDE_i386=           SLURM
OPTIONS_EXCLUDE_mips=           SLURM
OPTIONS_EXCLUDE_powerpc=        SLURM
